chief_commissioner_for_persons_with_disa.jurisdiction: National level authority appointed by Central Government.
core_functions: Inquire into complaints regarding deprivation of rights.
Review safeguards for persons with disabilities.
chief_commissioner_for_persons_with_disa.powers: Civil court powers for summoning, requisitioning documents and examining evidence.

state_commissioner_for_persons_with_disa.jurisdiction: State level authority appointed by State Government.
core_functions: Inquire into complaints of rights violations.
Advise State Government on policy matters.
state_commissioner_for_persons_with_disa.powers: Powers of civil court for inquiry purposes.

complaint_mechanism.who_can_file: Any person with disability or their representative.
complaint_mechanism.subject_matter: Denial of rights, discrimination, non-implementation of provisions, reservation violation.

special_courts.purpose: State Government may designate Special Courts for speedy trial of offences under the Act.

advisory_boards.function: Advise Governments on disability policy and implementation.

legal_boundary_conditions: Commissioners provide quasi-judicial oversight but not criminal conviction.
Criminal offences prosecuted through designated courts.
Recommendations binding subject to statutory framework.
